sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32284" key="e)kkulisto\s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκκῠλ-ιστὸς</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">στέφανος</foreign> <sense id="n32284.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a</tr_> garland <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">closely wreathed</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rolled together,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0417.tlg001:40" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">40</biblScope></bibl>,etc.</sense> </entryFree>
